what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG dashboard icon with an outer rounded rectangle, internal horizontal and vertical dividers, and two short top-row indicator strokes.
observations: Uses a 24 by 24 viewBox with explicit width and height of 24.
Uses no fill and strokes set to currentColor.
Stroke width is 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
Draws an outer rounded rectangle from x=3 y=4 to width=18 height=16 with rx=2.
Draws a horizontal divider at y=12 and a vertical divider from y=12 to y=20.
Draws two short top indicators at y=8.
standouts: Simple dashboard layout built from one rect and two path elements.
conventions: Follows common outline icon conventions: 24x24 viewport, no fill, currentColor stroke, rounded caps and joins.
concerns: No title or ARIA metadata is present, so standalone accessibility semantics are not defined in this file.
notes: A compact outline SVG representing a dashboard or panel layout.
questions: Should accessibility labeling be handled by the consuming component?
Is the icon intended to be decorative or meaningful when rendered?
Should the stroke width remain fixed at 1.5 for all icon sizes?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a dashboard icon, and the SVG depicts a dashboard-like panel layout.
intention_signals: It appears intended to serve as a reusable dashboard icon that can inherit color from surrounding UI text or controls.
contribution: Provides a reusable theme-colored dashboard glyph with clear panel structure and simple scalable SVG geometry.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor outline SVG dashboard icon with a rounded panel, dividers, and two top indicator marks.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing a dashboard section or action in a UI icon set.
